name: Monorepo Detection
title: Monorepo Project Detection
purpose: Verify the agent detects monorepo structures and generates multi-directory CI harnesses.
prompt: Build a full-stack SaaS platform with monorepo structure containing frontend/ and backend/ subdirectories.
setup: Project has a root package.json with workspaces, frontend/ with Next.js, and backend/ with FastAPI.
steps: Submit the prompt with monorepo constraints.
Confirm the agent detects the monorepo structure.
Check it generates CI with multiple jobs or workspace-aware configuration.
Verify harness covers each workspace directory.
expected: The agent detects monorepo, generates multi-job CI covering each workspace directory.
